channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Lamar Jackson breaks NFL QB rushing record, accounts for 3 TDs in Ravens' 31-2 romp over Texans
item.description: Lamar Jackson broke the NFL career rushing record for quarterbacks in Baltimore’s 31-2 victory over the Houston Texans on Wednesday, bolstering his case for MVP as the Ravens moved closer to the AFC North title.
item.dc:creator: Kristie Rieken, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Embiid shakes off pregame fall, leads Sixers to 118-114 win over Celtics
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Joel Embiid popped up from a pregame fall and scored 27 points with nine rebounds, making 4 of 5 from 3-point range and sinking a pair of free throws with 3 seconds left to turn back Boston’s final rally and lead the Philadelphia 76ers to a 118-114 victory on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: JIMMY GOLEN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Heat list Jimmy Butler as doubtful for Thursday as speculation about his future intensifies
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — The Miami Heat are listing Jimmy Butler as doubtful for their game Thursday at Orlando, saying he needs time to recondition before returning to the lineup. Butler did not fly with the team to Orlando on Wednesday night, and his intentions for future games seem a bit unclear as well.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Netflix's NFL Christmas Day coverage experiences miscues
item.description: Some minor technical issues popped up during Netflix's coverage of the Christmas Day matchup between the Kansas City Chiefs and the Pittsburgh Steelers, including one of the game’s graphics briefly displaying an error shortly after kickoff.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Chiefs' Xavier Worthy hit with penalty after touchdown, sparks fan frenzy
item.description: A penalty called on Kansas City Chiefs rookie wide receiver Xavier Worthy after a touchdown during the Christmas Day game against the Pittsburgh Steelers left fans on social media confused.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bridges scores season-high 41, Knicks withstand Wembanyama's monster Christmas debut to edge Spurs
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Mikal Bridges scored a season-high 41 points, and the New York Knicks overcame 42 from Victor Wembanyama in a monster Christmas debut to edge the San Antonio Spurs 117-114 on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MAHONEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Netflix under pressure with Christmas Day NFL slate after Tyson-Paul streaming debacle
item.description: Netflix is under a lot of pressure for Wednesday's NFL Christmas doubleheader after many subscribers had issues watching the Mike Tyson-Jake Paul fight.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Fox News Digital Sports NFL power rankings after Week 16 of the 2024 season
item.description: The NFL playoff picture has nearly come into full focus with two weeks remaining in the regular season. Even on a short week, there's still a lot to play for.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Cowboys owner Jerry Jones lobbies for NFL Christmas Day games to continue on annual basis
item.description: Streaming giant Netflix will carry this year's Christmas Day NFL doubleheader. The Steelers host the Chiefs, the Ravens face the Texans in the special holiday games.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: How name, image and likeness laws have changed college sports
item.description: The Supreme Court ruled in 2021 the NCAA could not prevent student athletes from profiting from their game. Since the decision, legal fights have continued between the NCAA and US states.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Embiid ejected after drawing 2 technicals in game against Wembanyama and Spurs
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Philadelphia 76ers star Joel Embiid was ejected in the first half of Monday night’s 111-106 victory over the San Antonio Spurs after drawing two technical fouls. Referee Jenna Schroeder ejected Embiid with 2:59 left in the second quarter.
item.dc:creator: AARON BRACY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Blackhawks drop 2nd straight on road trip in 4-3 loss to Wild
item.description: ST. PAUL, Minn. (AP) — Brock Faber snapped a tie in the third period, and the Minnesota Wild stopped a four-game losing streak by edging the Blackhawks, 4-3, on Monday night. Kirill Kaprizov, Jared Spurgeon and Marcus Foligno also scored for Minnesota.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: No. 14 Gonzaga's matchup with No. 22 UCLA is the headliner on the week's light AP Top 25 schedule
item.description: Gonzaga coach Mark Few hadn't been off the court long over the weekend when the focus turned to preparing for the 14th-ranked Bulldogs' matchup with a ranked opponent days after Christmas. The good news was he could start thinking about it after a win, unlike UCLA's Mick Cronin — whose No.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Houston Astros welcome 1B Christian Walker to team; say negotiations with Bregman stalled
item.description: The Astros welcomed first baseman Christian Walker to the team Monday, in one of two moves that almost certainly marks the end of Alex Bregman’s time in Houston.
item.dc:creator: KRISTIE RIEKEN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: High-scoring Lions' fast start too much for Bears, Chicago loses 9th in a row
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago Bears spotted the Detroit Lions an early 20-0 lead and despite catching their groove midway through the game, Chicago came up short for the second time this season against Detroit.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Flames get goals from 6 players in a 6-4 victory over the Blackhawks
item.description: Jonathan Huberdeau, Connor Zary, Blake Coleman, and Matt Coronato each had a goal and an assist as the Calgary Flames beat the Chicago Blackhawks 6-4 on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Northwestern demolishes DePaul in crosstown showdown
item.description: EVANSTON, Ill. (WGN) — An early blitz on the offensive end and playmaking down the stretch from Brooks Barnhizer and Nick Martinelli helped seal a convincing win for Northwestern over DePaul in the yearly crosstown showdown between the two programs.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Bulls face the Celtics on 3-game win streak
item.description: Boston Celtics (21-6, second in the Eastern Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (13-15, ninth in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Saturday, 8 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: Chicago will look to keep its three-game win streak going when the Bulls take on Boston.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Guenther scores twice as Utah HC beats Minnesota, 2-1
item.description: ST. PAUL, Minn. (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club is in seventh heaven right about now. Dylan Guenther scored twice, including the game-winner at 10:01 of the third period, as Utah ran its road winning streak to seven in a row Friday night with a hard-fought 2-1 victory over the Minnesota Wild.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utah HC erases two-goal deficit to stun Vancouver
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Mikhail Sergachev scored with 12 seconds left in overtime, as the Utah Hockey Club stormed back from a 2-0 deficit in the third period to beat the Vanouver Canucks and end a five-game home losing streak, 3-2.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
